episodes.title: The Rise of Digital Cults: Nature Boy Was Just the Beginning
episodes.description:
Are we watching digital cults form in real time?

In today’s video, we’re diving deep into the rise of online cult-like dynamics, the psychology of manipulation, and why so many people are comparing certain internet personalities to high-control groups. From the rise and fall of Nature Boy (Carbon Nation) to modern day influencer relationships and online “family” dynamics, we’re asking the hard questions.

What actually makes a cult a cult? Is it control? Isolation? Charisma? Financial dependence? Or are we becoming so desensitized to toxic dynamics online that we don’t recognize the red flags anymore?

We’re breaking down the psychology behind cults, coercive control, parasocial relationships, and how social media may be changing what cults look like in the digital age.

This is more than internet tea it’s a conversation about power, influence, vulnerability, and why some people get pulled into these dynamics.

⚠️ Disclaimer: This video is commentary and opinion based on publicly available information and observable online behavior. The purpose is discussion, education, and analysis.

Drop your thoughts in the comments: Are digital cults becoming normalized online?
